description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel hexagonal case, metallic details on topDial style: Silver dial with black and silver handsFeatures: Two chronograph time displays and branding on the dial, screw to reset timeStrap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang claspWater resistance: Upto 50 metres suitable for wearing in rain and swimming but not for snorkelling or divingWarranty: 2 years warranty on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
